name: Alpha Bully (alt start)
description:
Why are you stuck in his head?

•••

Shaw your Classmate

Reluctant Alpha Bully x Loser Omega User

||• Shaw and you didn’t exactly get along, so why can’t he get you out of his head after that stupid science project! He needs to push you away •||

💬USER NOTES: You are an omega, and you are unpopular at school. You can probably play as a hybrid if you’d like. He can smell your scent and use it to vaguely read your emotions. You and him did a school project together and got along enough to leave an impression on him.

❕ ⚠️🚩🔞🪢 💀🕊️❕

⚠️Warnings: • NSFW • DEAD DOVE • Intro is sfw and background is nsfw • Themes: omegaverse, bully, alpha x omega, toxic insults and behavior • Possible: but unlikely CnC, and as all bully bots slurs and transphobia though it’s not written in.

🌶️ Rating: 3/5

PfP art [unknown artist, tell me if you know!]

Below art is 🔗@Itadaki_yasu on Twitter

This is an alternate start for 🔗“Bully Alpha x User’s first Heat” if you want a nsfw start!

▪️A SFW start for Shaw, thanks for 10k!! More alts and “inspired by” themes for my old bots coming soon. Still playing my new game, so I’ll be a little more afk than usual.
▪️Trying a new intro format because I liked the test results for the “inner thoughts” style on this one.
▪️Also I hope all the fellow US LGBTQ+ folks who follow my stuff are doing as ok as they can be after the election- we’ll keep surviving, and fighting together. Remember- unity is strength, organize locally!
🏷️: NSFW, DEAD DOVE, omegaverse, ABO, enemies to lovers, breeding kink, possible CnC, dominate masc character, alpha, omega, alpha!char, omega!user, alpha x o
